_comment: Skip-list for `zig build wasi-p3-testsuite` (scripts/wasi_p3_testsuite.py). This is the WASI Preview 3 *behavioral* parity gate (#267 Phase 4): real wasm32-wasip3 guest programs are lifted by `wabt component new`, then EXECUTED on the pinned Wasmtime and checked against the testsuite manifest's expected exit code / stdout. (Contrast tests/p3-conformance-skip.json, which only validates that wabt's hand-authored single-built-in fixtures *encode* acceptably via `wasmtime compile`.) Keys are `<suite-name>` -> { `<test-name>`: rationale }. Each rationale MUST end in a tracking issue (e.g. '... (#NNN)'). Suite + test names match the vendored `tests/wasi-testsuite/tests/rust/testsuite/wasm32-wasip3/manifest.json`. The upstream wasm32-wasip3 fixtures are not vendored yet, so the gate skips cleanly until they are (see scripts/wasi_p3_testsuite.py). Mirrors wamr's tests/wasi-p3-testsuite-skip.json convention.
